/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libauv_control__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libauv_control__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/auv_control__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/auv_control/srv/detail/inject_fault__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/luiso/auv_ftc_ws/build/auv_control:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libauv_control__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
